description: External auditors are arriving next Monday morning and require the 'Main Conference Room' for its secure line. Relocate the 'Team Standup' meeting (scheduled for next Monday at 9:00 AM in the 'Main Conference Room') to 'Zoom Meeting' without deleting the event. Create a new one-hour meeting named 'External Audit Kickoff' for that same time slot in the 'Main Conference Room' and add 'Alice Johnson', 'Grace Patel', and 'Karen Lee' as attendees. Log in with username 'admin' and password 'admin' if prompted.
